case_title: VOLKER, ANNE MARIE VS RICHARDSON, DAVID ANTONIO

docket_entries.description: DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DAVID ANTONIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY VOLKER, ANNE MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DAVID ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
JUDGMENT TO BE SATISFIED BY INITIAL PAYMENT OF $1000 ON OR BEFORE 4/27/96;BALANCE PAYABLE IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENT OF $50 COMMENCING 5/15/96

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOLKER, ANNE MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DAVID ANTONIO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COPY OF ORDER SENT TO DEFT, DAVID RICHARDSON.
UNTIMELY SERVICE. DEFT WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 25 DAYS NOTICE FOR SUBSTITUTED SERVICE OUT OF COUNTY.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DAVID ANTONIO
AND ON THE 15TH OF EACH SUCCEEDING MONTH.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, DAVID ANTONIO
